rationale: Adds an `AGENTS.md` file documenting the Cursor Cloud development environment for the static HTML/CSS/JS APUSH learning hub: dev server command (`python3 test-server.py` on port 8000), flake8 lint invocations matching `.github/workflows/python-app.yml`, pytest note (0 items collected), and gotchas about absent `package.json`/`requirements.txt` plus the optional Gemini integration. Each statement matches the PR body's stated purpose and is a plausible accurate description of the repo. Pure documentation addition with no executable code, no test changes, and no hallucinated dependencies.
